title: MineTerrariaBosses
description: Adds Bosses, Armors, biomes, and weapons from Terraria to MC
body:
Everything is this mod is from the video game Terraria.

This mod adds many elements from the game Terraria into minecraft. This included armor, weapons, bosses, gear, and biomes. You get achievements for killer bosses and some loot.

Now this includes 2 bosses, 2 mobs, 3 pairs or armor, 2 ores, 4 new gear, two swords and 1 pickaxe, 1 biome.

Tungsten ore only spawns in deserts, Platinum ore only spawns in Mountains. Crimtane is dropped by Crimson bosses.

This is ealy development, all bosses and events from terraria as well as a lot more weapons and gear shall be added.
